DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ROBERT SMITH, ESQ., 415.434.1144, FOR CROSS DEFENDANT DE LOS REYES KING STREET DENTAL INC.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT DE LOS REYES KING STREET DENTAL INC.'s DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. Cross Plaintiff has not pled facts with sufficient particularity to meet the heightened pleading standard for a cause of action of fraud. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2013 Continued To Apr-02-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
CROSS DEFENDANT DE LOS REYES KING STREET DENTAL INC.'S, DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
is continued on the court's own motion to April 2, 2013 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 4 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be sustained. The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/AJR)
